reference: What could it be if my sixteen-month-old son had two dime-sized bumps close together on his leg that looked like bites but had no spot to indicate a bite that developed into one and ended up looking like a bruise? It itched and hurt him when it was red, but not much anymore, and he has had it for almost a week. It seems slightly better.
text: What could it be if my 16-month-old son had two dime-sized bumps close together on his leg, like bites, but had no spots to indicate a bite that developed into one and ended up looking like a broom? He itched and hurt him when it was red, but not much anymore, and he has had it for almost a week; it seems slightly better.
